src/injection-mode.ts.summary: Defines the InjectionMode enum (PROXY, CLASSIC) and its string-literal type.
src/injection-mode.ts.outputs: InjectionModeType type and the InjectionMode constant record.
src/injection-mode.ts.should: Declare the two supported dependency injection modes as a frozen-style lookup record and mirror the type.
src/injection-mode.ts.shouldNot: Contain resolution logic, import other modules, or perform any runtime behavior beyond declaring constants.

src/lifetime.ts.summary: Defines the Lifetime enum (SINGLETON, TRANSIENT, SCOPED) plus a lifetime-comparison helper.
src/lifetime.ts.inputs: Two LifetimeType values for the comparison helper.
src/lifetime.ts.outputs: LifetimeType type, Lifetime record, isLifetimeLonger predicate.
src/lifetime.ts.should: Enumerate registration lifetimes and expose a pure predicate ranking lifetime length for leak checks.
src/lifetime.ts.shouldNot: Perform resolution, caching, or import container/resolver modules; hold state.

src/utils.ts.summary: Small generic helpers: array flatten/last/uniq, name-value coercion, and function/class detection.
src/utils.ts.inputs: Arrays, name/value pairs, and functions/values to inspect.
src/utils.ts.outputs: flatten, nameValueToObject, last, isClass, isFunction, uniq.
src/utils.ts.should: Provide stateless utility functions, using the tokenizer only to classify a function as a class.
src/utils.ts.shouldNot: Contain domain logic for containers/resolvers, mutate inputs, or perform I/O.

src/function-tokenizer.ts.summary: A hand-written lexer that tokenizes JS/TS function source into a stream of tokens.
src/function-tokenizer.ts.inputs: A function's source string and optional tokenizer flags.
src/function-tokenizer.ts.outputs: createTokenizer factory returning next/done, plus Token/TokenType types and TokenizerFlags.
src/function-tokenizer.ts.should: Scan identifiers, parens, commas, defaults, comments, and strings, skipping expressions to feed the param parser.
src/function-tokenizer.ts.shouldNot: Understand DI semantics, resolve dependencies, or depend on any other project module.

src/param-parser.ts.summary: Parses a function/class-constructor source string into its list of parameters via the tokenizer.
src/param-parser.ts.inputs: Function source string; consumes tokens from function-tokenizer.
src/param-parser.ts.outputs: Parameter interface and parseParameterList (array of params or null).
src/param-parser.ts.should: Extract parameter names and optionality for arrow/normal/generator/async functions and class constructors.
src/param-parser.ts.shouldNot: Resolve dependencies, touch the container, or perform I/O; only structural parsing.

src/errors.ts.summary: Defines the Awilix error hierarchy and message-formatting for type, resolution, and registration failures.
src/errors.ts.inputs: Error messages, names, resolution stacks, and type-assertion arguments.
src/errors.ts.should: Construct rich error objects, format resolution paths, and assert type conditions.
src/errors.ts.shouldNot: Perform resolution or registration itself; import container/resolver runtime (only ResolutionStack type).

src/list-modules.ts.summary: Globs the filesystem for module files and returns their names, resolved paths, and options.
src/list-modules.ts.inputs: Glob pattern(s) with optional per-pattern options; cwd and glob implementation.
src/list-modules.ts.outputs: listModules function, ListModulesOptions, ModuleDescriptor, GlobWithOptions types.
src/list-modules.ts.should: Run fast-glob, normalize separators, derive module names, and resolve absolute paths.
src/list-modules.ts.shouldNot: Require/import the matched modules, register them, or resolve dependencies.

src/load-modules.ts.summary: Loads globbed modules (CJS or native ESM) and registers their exports into a container.
src/load-modules.ts.inputs: Injected deps (listModules, container, require), glob patterns, and load options.
src/load-modules.ts.outputs: loadModules function plus LoadModulesOptions/Result, name-formatter and descriptor types.
src/load-modules.ts.should: List, require/import, parse default and RESOLVER-tagged exports, apply name formatting, and register resolvers.
src/load-modules.ts.shouldNot: Implement globbing, resolver construction internals, or container resolution logic directly.

src/resolvers.ts.summary: Builds resolver objects (asValue/asFunction/asClass/aliasTo) and the fluent lifetime/injection/disposer API.
src/resolvers.ts.inputs: Values, functions, classes, resolver options, and the container at resolve time.
src/resolvers.ts.outputs: RESOLVER symbol, resolver factories, fluent builders, and the Resolver/BuildResolver type family.
src/resolvers.ts.should: Create resolve functions, parse dependencies, wrap the cradle/injector proxies, and dispatch by injection mode.
src/resolvers.ts.shouldNot: Own the registration store, cache, lifetime caching, or filesystem module loading.

src/container.ts.summary: Implements the DI container: registration store, cradle proxy, scoped resolution, caching, and disposal.
src/container.ts.inputs: Container options, resolvers to register, and names to resolve; glob patterns for loadModules.
src/container.ts.outputs: createContainer plus AwilixContainer and supporting interfaces/types.
src/container.ts.should: Manage registrations, family tree, lifetime caching, cycle/leak detection, scopes, build, and dispose.
src/container.ts.shouldNot: Parse function sources, construct resolver builders, or glob the filesystem itself (delegates to those modules).

src/awilix.ts.summary: The public entry point re-exporting the library's container, resolvers, errors, and enums.
src/awilix.ts.inputs: Named exports from the internal modules.
src/awilix.ts.outputs: The library's public API surface (types and runtime values).
src/awilix.ts.should: Aggregate and re-export the intended public symbols only.
src/awilix.ts.shouldNot: Contain any logic, define new behavior, or expose internal-only helpers.

src/load-module-native.d.ts.summary: Ambient type declaration for the native ESM importModule helper used to dynamically import files.
src/load-module-native.d.ts.outputs: importModule function signature returning a Promise.
src/load-module-native.d.ts.should: Declare the type contract for native dynamic import so the container can type-check ESM loading.
src/load-module-native.d.ts.shouldNot: Contain any implementation or runtime code.
